videos.headline: Clemson survives big scare from North Carolina
videos.description: The Clemson Tigers go into Chapel Hill and barely escape with a win, taking down the Tar Heels 21-20.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Clemson survives big scare from North Carolina) 2019/9/28 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: UNC opens up with quick score on Clemson
videos.description: Sam Howell finds a wide-open Dyami Brown for the early 40-yard Tar Heels score.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (UNC opens up with quick score) 2019/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson misses early 40-yard FG
videos.description: Clemson kicker B.T. Potter pulls a kick wide left as Clemson is down to North Carolina on the road early.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Clemson misses early 40-yard FG) 2019/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Etienne gets Clemson on the board
videos.description: Travis Etienne runs 13 yards untouched up the middle to get the Tigers on the board for the first time in the game.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Etienne gets Clemson on the board) 2019/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: UNC breaks out turnover belt with fumble recovery
videos.description: UNC's Jason Strowbridge breaks out the turnover belt after recovering a Travis Etienne fumble.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (UNC breaks out turnover belt with fumble recovery) 2019/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Howell finds Corrales to put UNC up on Clemson
videos.description: Sam Howell finds a wide-open Beau Corrales who trots into the end zone to gibe North Carolina a 14-7 lead on Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Howell finds Corrales to put UNC up on Clemson) 2019/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lawrence calls his own number to tie UNC at the half
videos.description: Trevor Lawrence runs right up the middle as Clemson ties up North Carolina right before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Lawrence calls his own number to tie UNC at the half) 2019/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lawrence throws dime to Higgins to grab lead
videos.description: Trevor Lawrence finds Tee Higgins with an absolute dime as Clemson grabs the lead in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Lawrence throws dime to Higgins to grab lead) 2019/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Swinney: 'We did enough to win'
videos.description: Dabo Swinney breaks down Clemson surviving a scare from North Carolina in Week 5.
